use_cases: Displaying fashion products in a horizontally scrollable carousel for e-commerce product browsing
Showcasing clothing and accessories with model and product imagery
Creating animated product showcases with scroll-triggered reveals
Featuring sale items with original and discounted pricing display
Building fashion retail landing pages with animated product grids
ai_summary: An e-commerce product carousel component featuring fashion items with dual image displays (product and model shots). Uses GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll-based animations and displays product titles, current prices, and optional original prices with strikethrough formatting. Designed for desktop and mobile platforms with a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for fashion retail interfaces.
